signin.title: Welcome back
signin.lead: Sign in to schedule pickups and track your impact.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.lead: Join Scrap-it and turn your scrap into impact.

login.passwordHint: Use at least {{count}} characters with letters and numbers.
login.encryptedNotice: Encrypted sign-in. We never share your data.
login.termsNotice: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
login.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.profileLoadError: We couldn't load your profile. Please try again.

1.title: Professional pickups at your doorstep
1.body: Book trusted scrap pickup partners in a few taps.

2.title: Fast booking and smart scheduling
2.body: Select categories, choose timing, and confirm instantly.

3.title: Track every pickup in real time
3.body: See driver progress and order timeline with clarity.

home.profileError: We couldn't load your profile. Check your connection and API settings.
home.addressPlaceholder: Set pickup location — add an address when you schedule
home.noPickupSubtitle: Reserve a slot and get pickup at your doorstep.
home.impactSubtitle: You've contributed to a cleaner planet.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: History and active pickups
orders.emptyDescription: Schedule a pickup from the home tab.

detail.mapPreviewSubtitle: Live tracking connects when backend is ready.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Account and impact
profile.loadError: Couldn't load your account. Check your connection and try again.
profile.addName: Add your name in Edit profile

editProfile.title: Edit profile
editProfile.loadError: Couldn't load your profile. Check your connection and try again.
editProfile.subtitle: Your name and phone appear on pickups and receipts.

pickup.scheduleFailedBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.

photos.title: Add photos
photos.subtitle: Optional – helps us estimate better
photos.helperText: Clear photos help us provide accurate estimates.
photos.unavailableBody: Photo picking needs a native build that includes expo-image-picker. Run a new Android/iOS build (e.g. expo run:android) or rebuild your dev client.
photos.permissionBody: Allow photo library access to attach reference images for your pickup.
photos.rebuildBody: Rebuild your development client so expo-image-picker native code is included, then try again.

review.title: Review your request
review.subtitle: Make sure everything looks good
review.warning: Final amount will be calculated after weighing at pickup.

success.title: Pickup scheduled!
success.body: Your pickup #{{code}} has been confirmed. We'll notify you when the driver is on the way.
